EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to view information about service accounts on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete service accounts on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} deleted service accounts on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create a service account on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change a service account on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to view information about service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is creating service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting service accounts on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is viewing information about service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete a service account on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} created service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} viewed information about service accounts on host {event_src.host}
